summary: Top‑notch OADE audience recording of an outstanding 1985 show highlighted by a killer Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain sequence and superb Jerry solos.
review: The performance is consistently praised for its sterling musicianship, with the Scarlet Begonias into Fire on the Mountain transition singled out as one of the best of the era and Jerry Garcia’s solos described as “realm‑traveling.” Reviewers also note tight, energetic drumming and an overall focused yet adventurous vibe. The OADE recording is lauded as “top‑notch,” sounding nice with a pleasant, slightly different feel from typical soundboard tapes.

ai_rating.rationale: All reviewers give 4–5 stars and highlight both exceptional musical performance (especially the Scarlet > Fire sequence) and excellent recording quality from OADE, yielding a high combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe the OADE capture as “nice,” “top‑notch,” and having a distinct feel compared to pure soundboard mixes, with no reported dropouts or major flaws.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows smoothly, highlighted by an especially praised transition from Scarlet Begonias into Fire on the Mountain; overall energy stays high without losing focus.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His solos on Fire on the Mountain are called "realm‑traveling" and a major reason to seek out this show.
band_member_comments.Drums: Great, energetic drumming is noted (“another great drumz”).
